name: Carrot Cabbage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the carrot slices until crisp-tender.
2. Heat the oil in a large pan and add the onions, cooking for a few minutes.
3. Add cabbage and cook for 10 more minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the salt, pepper, and carrots.
5. Oil an 8-inch x 8-inch baking pan.
6. Mix half the tofu sour cream into the vegetables.
7. Add the nutritional yeast to the remaining tofu.
8. Put this mixture on top of the vegetables.
9. Sprinkle bread crumbs and sesame seeds over the casserole.
10. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
TOFU SOUR CREAM:
2 cups tofu (firm can be used)
1/4 cup oil
3 tablespoons lemon juice (or vinegar)
1/2 teaspoon salt
1 tablespoon nutritional yeast
